'''hakasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyrk|kyrk]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-k-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyrk|kyrk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hakasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hækæsæth|hækæsæth]] || [[word:hækæsæj|hækæsæj]] || [[word:hækæsæsh|hækæsæsh]] || [[word:hækæsæ|hækæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hakakasath|hakakasath]] || [[word:hakakasaj|hakakasaj]] || [[word:hakakasash|hakakasash]] || [[word:hakakasa|hakakasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hakasath|hakasath]] || [[word:hakasaj|hakasaj]] || [[word:hakasash|hakasash]] || [[word:hakasa|hakasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hakafsath|hakafsath]] || [[word:hakafsaj|hakafsaj]] || [[word:hakafsash|hakafsash]] || [[word:hakafsaf|hakafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hakasatha|hakasatha]] || [[word:hakasaja|hakasaja]] || [[word:hakasasha|hakasasha]] || [[word:hakasaka|hakasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hakasath|hakasath]] || [[word:hakasaj|hakasaj]] || [[word:hakasash|hakasash]] || [[word:hakasa|hakasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hakasathal|hakasathal]] || [[word:hakasajal|hakasajal]] || [[word:hakasashal|hakasashal]] || [[word:hakasakal|hakasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hakasathatha|hakasathatha]] || [[word:hakasajaja|hakasajaja]] || [[word:hakasashasha|hakasashasha]] || [[word:hakasaka|hakasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hakasathan|hakasathan]] || [[word:hakasajan|hakasajan]] || [[word:hakasashan|hakasashan]] || [[word:hakasakan|hakasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hakasathaoro|hakasathaoro]] || [[word:hakasajaoro|hakasajaoro]] || [[word:hakasashaoro|hakasashaoro]] || [[word:hakasakaoro|hakasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
